name: Cleopatra
text: Target 1 adjacent unit. Move it to Cleopatra's location. Charisma contest: on win take control of target unit for this round.
flavor: The last pharaoh played Rome like a harp.

name: Nikola Tesla
text: Buy an item from the market for free.
flavor: The man who lit the world — then vanished from it.

name: Miyamoto Musashi
text: Strength contest: injure target unit at same location.
flavor: Undefeated in sixty duels.

name: Ada Lovelace
text: Look at the top 3 cards of your main deck. Keep one.
flavor: The first programmer — before the first computer.

name: Genghis Khan
text: Raze target location. Place it in your HQ instead of discarding. Mission VP is not awarded. Your Equip actions involving a Mount cost 0 AP.
flavor: He did not build. He took.

name: Leonardo da Vinci
text: Draw 2 cards from your main deck.
flavor: The universal man needed no specialization.

name: Mansa Musa
text: Gain 5 gold.
flavor: His generosity crashed an economy.

name: Hypatia
text: Target friendly unit at same location gets +2 cunning until end of turn.
flavor: She taught Alexandria to think.

name: Sun Tzu
text: Move target enemy unit at same location to an adjacent location.
flavor: Supreme excellence consists in breaking the enemy's resistance without fighting.

name: Joan of Arc
text: All friendly units at this location get +2 strength until end of turn.
flavor: She heard voices — and a nation followed.

name: Marco Polo
text: Move Marco Polo to an adjacent location and gain 1 gold.
flavor: Twenty-four years of road and wonder.

name: Alexander the Great
text: Move to adjacent location and initiate a strength contest against target unit there.
flavor: He wept for there were no more worlds to conquer.

name: Nefertiti
text: All friendly units at this location get +2 charisma until end of turn.
flavor: Beauty was the least of her powers.

name: Galileo Galilei
text: Look at target opponent's hand.
flavor: And yet it moves.

name: Hannibal Barca
text: Strength contest against target unit at same location with +3 bonus.
flavor: He brought elephants across mountains.

name: Harriet Tubman
text: Move target friendly unit to an adjacent location ignoring one blocked edge.
flavor: She never lost a passenger.

name: Ibn Battuta
text: Move Ibn Battuta to an adjacent location and gain 1 gold.
flavor: Seventy-five thousand miles before the age of jet.

name: Ramesses II
text: Gain 1 VP. Ramesses II is killed.
flavor: He carved his name into eternity.

name: Mary Shelley
text: The first event you play each turn costs 0 AP.
flavor: She gave lightning a soul.

name: Spartacus
text: When Spartacus wins combat you may injure him to kill the target instead.
flavor: He fought not for glory but for freedom.
